answer: The capital of Australia is Canberra. It was chosen as a compromise between Sydney and Melbourne. Canberra is located in the Australian Capital Territory.

results.title: What's the Capital of Australia? Not Sydney or Melbourne! | Ovolo Blog
results.snippet: ##### Canberra, Australia. ##### Canberra, Australia. ##### Canberra, Australia. #### Sydney is not the capital of Australia! Foreigners often debate between Sydney and Melbourne when asked what the capital of Australia is, but the correct answer is actually Canberra, ACT. ### **Why is Canberra the Capital of Australia?**. Canberra in Australia Capital Territory is a small city of around 450,000 people that sits between Sydney and Melbourne. The site was chosen as the location for Australia’s capital in 1908 as a compromise between the two aforementioned cities. Canberra has not always been top of the list of places to visit in Australia, but it’s incredible natural surroundings, historical landmarks, galleries and vibrant food and bar scene have seen it grow in popularity. Ovolo Nishi is Canberra’s best boutique hotel and the perfect base to set out on your exploration of Australia’s capital city. Australian capital, Canberra, is a hidden gem and a highly underrated city that is definitely worth a visit! ##### Canberra, Australia.

results.title: What is the capital of Australia? If you thought it was Sydney, keep on reading
results.snippet: # What is the capital of Australia? **The capital of Australia is Canberra**. Even though the grand opening ceremony was to be held in Melbourne, **no city had yet been designated as the capital of Australia**. Faced with widespread chaos, a radical decision was made to cut to the chase: they **would build a new city from the ground up!** Australia’s first capital city built from the ground up. ## Canberra, Australia’s small capital city. But entertaining highlights were not limited to those years in Australia’s new capital city. When spring returns, **over 500,000 visitors flock straight to Australia’s capital city to admire the sea of flowers surrounding Lake Burley Griffin**. And this is the brief history of how Canberra became Australia’s capital city. That said, if you don’t just want to read about Australia and what you really want is to live there, why not start your journey here? What is the capital of Australia? results.title: Australian Capital Territory (Canberra) | Study Australia
results.snippet: Skip to content or footer. # Australian Capital Territory (Canberra). Australia's capital is a young, vibrant city with a reputation for inclusivity, innovation, and excellence in education. ## About the Australian Capital Territory (ACT). The Australian Capital Territory is home to one of the nation’s most significant cities - Canberra. Its location offers a unique Australian experience, and provides easy access to national parks, Australia's biggest snowfields in winter and the pristine beaches of the New South Wales south coast in summer. Over 25% of the ACT's residents were born overseas, including 15,000 international students from over 100 countries. Over 60% of the ACT is open space and nature reserves. The ACT is home to some of the country’s best ranked institutions, with several in Australia’s top 10 and the world’s top 100. ## About Canberra. ## A snapshot of Canberra. Use our Cost of Living calculator to find out how much you will need to live and study here. ## Footer content.
